# OpenPath Design System — Index
> Version: 0.2 | For full specification see llms-full.txt

---

## What is this?

OpenPath DS is a React component library built on a 3-tier token architecture.
Use `llms-full.txt` when you need raw prop tables, token rules, or usage examples.
Use this file to orient yourself before diving in.

---

## Token Architecture (summary)

```
Tier 1 Primitive  →  Tier 2 Alias  →  Tier 3 Component
  raw values           semantic roles    component-specific
  (excluded from AI)   ← use these       ← or these
```

Import path from any component: `../../tokens`
Never import from `tokens/primitives` directly inside components.

Token groups: `alias.brand` `alias.text` `alias.surface` `alias.border` `alias.feedback`
Spacing: 4px grid — `spacing[1]`=4px … `spacing[10]`=40px (no arbitrary px)
Shape: `shape.xs` → `shape.full` (badges → pill buttons)
Elevation: `elevation[0–5]` (flat → urgent overlays)

---

## Component Index

| Component | Import | One-line description |
|-----------|--------|----------------------|
| `Button` | `components/Button` | Primary action trigger — 4 variants, 3 sizes |
| `Input` | `components/Input` | Text field with label, helper, error states |
| `Modal` | `components/Modal` | Blocking dialog for confirmable/destructive actions |
| `Chips` | `components/Chips` | Filter tag — toggleable, optionally removable |
| `Card` | `components/Card` | Content surface — elevated / outlined / filled |
| `AppBar` | `components/AppBar` | Top navigation bar, 56px fixed height |
| `TabBar` | `components/Tab` | Horizontal tab navigation, 2–5 items |
| `FAB` | `components/FAB` | Floating action button — sm / md / lg / extended |
| `Snackbar` | `components/Snackbar` | Transient feedback toast — auto-dismiss or persistent |
| `List` + `ListItem` | `components/List` | Structured list container with leading/trailing slots |

---

## Key Rules

- One `filled` Button per context — never two side by side
- `Input` must always have a `label` (accessibility)
- `duration={null}` on Snackbar requires an `action` prop
- `divider={false}` on the last `ListItem` (avoids double border)
- Never nest `elevated` Cards
- One FAB per screen maximum

---

## Full Reference

→ `llms-full.txt` — complete token tables, all props, do/don't examples, design principles
